plan_review_notes: Approve the policy-evaluator slice: add PromotionDecision and InvalidationRecord models plus read-only helpers that derive candidate, verified, promotable, stale, and invalid outcomes for FeatureChangeArtifact without wiring workflow mutations.

plan_review_history.notes: Approve the policy-evaluator slice: add PromotionDecision and InvalidationRecord models plus read-only helpers that derive candidate, verified, promotable, stale, and invalid outcomes for FeatureChangeArtifact without wiring workflow mutations.

spec_review_notes: Freeze scope to read-only FeatureChangeArtifact policy evaluation models and tests. No workflow mutation routing or automatic promotion transitions in this slice.

normal_cases.name: A verified feature projection with required slots, passing claims, and matching lineage evaluates as promotable.

edge_cases.name: A pre-verify feature projection stays in candidate state and reports the missing promotion obligations instead of failing evaluation.
A lineage mismatch or stale child artifact produces a stale invalidation record without mutating the task.

exception_cases.name: A failed invariant, failed verification claim, or selected implementation that is not part of the candidate set evaluates as invalid with explicit blocking reasons.

verification_methods.target: A verified feature projection with required slots, passing claims, and matching lineage evaluates as promotable.
A pre-verify feature projection stays in candidate state and reports the missing promotion obligations instead of failing evaluation.
A lineage mismatch or stale child artifact produces a stale invalidation record without mutating the task.
A failed invariant, failed verification claim, or selected implementation that is not part of the candidate set evaluates as invalid with explicit blocking reasons.
